item.title: Pregnant Ronika Love Isn’t Stressing as She Prepares to Welcome Her First Baby with Packers Quarterback Jordan Love (Exclusive)
item.description: The couple announced on Jan. 1 that they are expecting their first baby together

item.title: Former Super Bowl Champion Barry Wilburn Dies In House Fire, Washington Commanders Confirm
item.description: Barry Wilburn led the NFL in interceptions in 1987 and won a Super Bowl with Washington that same season

item.title: Donna Mills, 85, and Barbara Hershey, 78, Enjoy Active Day of Racket Sports
item.description: The two women connected as they enjoyed a new sport

item.title: Trump Insists Future Inaugurations Will Be in White House Ballroom as He Touts 'Ahead of Schedule' East Wing
item.description: Though construction is already underway, a judge has yet to rule on whether Trump's use of private funding for the $400 million ballroom structure is ...

item.title: “Outlander” EP Reveals They Filmed Multiple Endings of the Show's Final Season
item.description: 'Outlander' is coming to an end with season 8, which premieres on March 6 on Starz
